results.title: P!NK Promises 'Absolute Mayhem' As She Prepares To Host The 79th Tony Awards I N18G
results.description: Grammy-winning singer P!NK is ready to take on a brand-new challenge as host of the 79th Tony Awards. Speaking ahead of Broadway’s biggest night, P!NK revealed she never imagined herself hosting the ceremony and promised viewers 'seven and a half minutes of absolute mayhem' during the opening number. The singer also opened up about her family’s love for musical theater, joked that her daughter Willow may finally think she’s cool, and shared advice she received from Neil Patrick Harris. The 79th Tony Awards will air live on June 7, celebrating the best of Broadway with P!NK at the helm.
